_doc: SINGLE source of every tunable. Swap this file (or its values) to onboard a different institution or client segment — no code changes. The AI executes this policy; it does not set it.

flagBands._doc: compositeScore (0-100) → riskFlag. < mediumFrom = low; < highFrom = medium; else high.

aggregation._doc: repeated signals in the same category have diminishing returns: category contribution = maxContribution + duplicateDiscount × sum(rest). Keeps the score driven by distinct red flags, not raw news volume.

signalWeights._doc: relative importance per signal category; scaled by weight/maxWeight in the score.

transactionRules._doc: thresholds for the numeric AML typology checks (ruleDiff).

embeddingGate._doc: a narrative signal escalates to Stage 2 if baselineSim < baselineSimMax OR maxArchetypeSim > archetypeSimMin. Tightened for simpleEmbed: most news sits at baselineSim~0.26 / archSim~0.29, so the old 0.6/0.55 escalated everything. 0.25/0.40 escalates only genuinely divergent or strongly archetype-matching news. With EMBED_BACKEND=transformers, re-measure and recalibrate.

signalFilter._doc: drop weak/low-value signals so they don't clutter the alert: dropped only if confidence < minConfidence AND magnitude < minMagnitude (a signal strong on either axis is kept).

sanctions._doc: two-tier name screening. score ≥ autoThreshold (and identifier match, if available) → auto CRITICAL. reviewThreshold ≤ score < autoThreshold → human review queue, NOT auto-blocked. < reviewThreshold → ignored. Avoids homonym false positives.

jury._doc: adversarial jury on HIGH cases: a prosecutor argues the risk is real, a defense argues it is benign, a judge decides. Adds explainability for the escalated few. Set enabled=false to skip.

riskArchetypes._doc: reference risk-pattern sentences (FATF/AML red flags). Incoming narrative is embedded and compared against each; the closest match hints at which drift dimension applies.
riskArchetypes.high_leverage_crypto: High-leverage crypto derivatives trading platform offering up to 100x leverage
riskArchetypes.shell_company: Inactive entity with no verifiable business operations or physical presence
riskArchetypes.sanctioned_jurisdiction_move: Relocation of legal domicile or operations to a jurisdiction under international sanctions
riskArchetypes.unexplained_volume_surge: Sudden, unexplained surge in transaction volume inconsistent with stated business activity
riskArchetypes.legal_regulatory_action: Company facing lawsuits, regulatory fines, criminal investigation, or enforcement action
riskArchetypes.key_personnel_change: Abrupt change of chief executive, chief financial officer, or board members
riskArchetypes.nominee_ownership: Ownership obscured through nominee shareholders or layered holding companies
riskArchetypes.legal_form_change: Conversion of legal form to an offshore international business company or trust
riskArchetypes.rapid_geographic_expansion: Rapid expansion of operations into multiple high-risk or offshore jurisdictions
riskArchetypes.website_content_change: Company website now advertises a different, higher-risk line of business than at onboarding
riskArchetypes.pep_exposure: An owner or officer becomes a politically exposed person or a close associate of one
